name: Darryl Colebank
focus: Budgeting and grant management • Financial oversight • Research program operations
bio: Darryl Colebank is a Senior Financial Oversight Analyst at Northern Arizona University, where he supports financial operations within the College of the Environment, Forestry, and Natural Sciences and the Radiant Center. His work focuses on budgeting, grant management, and ensuring the effective use of resources across research and academic programs. With a background in accounting and financial services at NAU, he has extensive experience supporting institutional operations and fiscal planning. In addition to his professional role, Colebank has been actively involved in community service initiatives, contributing to local volunteer efforts in the Flagstaff area.
